relevant_scheme_note: The shop, being only one month old, may qualify for additional working capital under SIDBI/RBI schemes to meet emergent needs of MSE units.
evidence_summary: Voice note indicates the shop is brand new and has been operating for 1 month.
Transaction records cover a 100-day period from 2026-01-05 to 2026-04-15 with total inflow of ₹57,500 and outflow of ₹20,500 across 8 transactions.
Average transaction value is ₹975 with high volatility and an increasing trend.
discrepancy_flags: The voice note states the business has been operating for 1 month, which matches the 100-day transaction span (approximately 3.3 months). This discrepancy between '1 month' and the actual 100-day period should be verified for accuracy.
